attacking_style: Not an attacker; positioned as sprint train component who occasionally finishes sprints when lead-out collapses or team lacks dedicated finisher.
team_tactics: Functions within Sunweb lead-out as positioning domestique for primary sprinter (Bennett), though capable of salvage role when organization breaks down in final 2km
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages with organized finishes; struggles when chaos disrupts trains in final 2km, lacks explosive acceleration against top-tier lead-out trains like Quick-Step
vulnerability: Chaotic sprint finales where positioning is disrupted (evidenced twice in Vuelta); lacks final acceleration horsepower to compete when Quick-Step or similar teams execute cleanly
key_patterns: Serves as lead-out/positioning wheel for Bennett rather than primary finisher (2 observations)
Lost positioning in final 2km during chaotic finishes, exposing train vulnerability (2 observations)
Provides salvage option when lead-out collapses but lacks top-tier finishing speed (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistently performing lead-out role but showing same positioning vulnerabilities in chaos without improvement between 2018-2019
